'''Rax Exeter''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] who served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], he was assigned to the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Steel Talon/Legends|''Steel Talon'']] before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] started.

==Appearances==
*[[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']] {{1st}}
